name: GitHub Dev Assistant
description: Full GitHub development workflow automation — repos, files, branches, PRs, issues, and GitHub Actions via OAuth

default_branch.description: Default branch name for commits and PRs

auto_sign_commits.description: Automatically sign commits on behalf of agent

require_pr_review.description: Require user confirmation before merging PRs

tools.name: github_list_repos
tools.description: Get list of user or organization repositories

tools.name: github_create_repo
tools.description: Create a new repository on GitHub

tools.name: github_get_file
tools.description: Get file content from a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_update_file
tools.description: Create new file or update existing file with a commit

tools.name: github_create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch from a specified ref

tools.name: github_list_prs
tools.description: Get list of pull requests with filtering

tools.name: github_merge_pr
tools.description: Merge a pull request with security policy checks

tools.name: github_create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a repository

tools.name: github_list_issues
tools.description: Get list of issues with filtering

tools.name: github_comment_issue
tools.description: Add a comment to an issue or pull request

tools.name: github_close_issue
tools.description: Close an issue or PR with optional comment

tools.name: github_trigger_workflow
tools.description: Manually trigger a GitHub Actions workflow
